commands.notes: The explicit Vitest include list was updated so the new Git diff grouping test runs with the suite.

verification.regression_notes: Added focused unit coverage for repository grouping, path rendering, and per-repository overflow limits.

handoff.summary: Implemented a repository-aware Git diff tree view powered by the built-in VS Code Git extension API, including repository grouping, full relative paths, diff navigation, near-real-time refresh hooks, and overflow handling for large repositories.
next_steps: A5_visual_polish_and_motion can invoke `workpackManager.showDiffPanel` from the pixel room when it adds in-room navigation affordances.
If desired, follow-up work can add a dedicated tree-provider test around Git extension disabled and no-repository empty states.

notes: The recorded commit captures the Git diff provider/runtime/test work only. The manifest entries for `workpackManager.gitDiff`, `workpackManager.showDiffPanel`, and `workpackManager.refreshGitDiff` were already present on this feature branch at commit time, so `package.json` is intentionally absent from `changes` and `change_details`. This output artifact was written after the commit and is therefore also excluded from the recorded change list.
